# viettelidc_ovpc_floating_ip (Data Source)

Look up a ViettelIDC Floating IP by its ID (vttFloatingId).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "viettelidc_ovpc_floating_ip" "fip" {
  id     = "existing-fip-id"
  vpc_id = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Floating IP ID (vttFloatingId).

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID.

### Read-Only

- `instance_id` (String) Associated VM instance ID.
- `network_interface_id` (String) Associated NIC ID.
- `public_ip` (String) Public IPv4 address.
